ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "TN" REAL /* True Negatives */,
  "FP" REAL /* False Positives */,
  "TP" REAL /* True Positives */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value */,
  "TPR" REAL /* True Positive Rate */,
  "FPR" REAL /* False Positive Rate */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the ROC Curve */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being iterated */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the iteration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the iteration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iteration_evaluations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id", "evaluation_id", "metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the notification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
column_names: Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression)
ID of the project the model belongs to
Date when the model was created
Date when the model was last updated
Hyperparameters used to train the model

Date when the evaluation was performed
